title: psoralea adscendens var. parva
intro: Psoralea adscendens var. parva, also known as the small Psoralea, is a small perennial plant that belongs to the legume family and is native to Australia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Psoralea adscendens var. parva include its ability to support skin health, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies for eczema, acne, and other skin issues. Herbal preparations of Psoralea adscendens var. parva can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken orally or applied topically to the skin, depending on the desired health benefit.
